title: Set 02 - DNS Records, Mail Routing, TTL & Caching
subject: Networking
topic: DNS Records, Mail Routing, TTL & Caching

questions.question: Which DNS record maps a domain to an IPv4 address?
questions.description: A records map names to IPv4 addresses.

questions.question: Which DNS record identifies mail servers?
questions.description: MX records indicate mail exchange servers for a domain.

questions.question: What does DNS TTL control?
options: How long records may be cached
How large a packet must be
How many users can log in
questions.description: TTL defines how long resolvers can cache DNS records.
